SEARCH
Module com.example.simul2d
Package com.example.simul2d.Entities.Mold

Class AxialMold1

java.lang.Object
com.example.simul2d.Entities.Entity
com.example.simul2d.Entities.Mold.Mold
com.example.simul2d.Entities.Mold.AxialMold
com.example.simul2d.Entities.Mold.AxialMold1
All Implemented Interfaces:
CanAge, CanGrow, CanPropagate, Displayable, Serializable
public class AxialMold1 extends AxialMold
A concrete axial mold type (AxialMold1) with specific growth and death parameters.

This mold uses the default axial propagation distribution but is tuned to live significantly longer by lowering the age‑death factors.

See Also:
  • AxialMold
  • Serialized Form

  • Constructor Details

    • AxialMold1

      public AxialMold1()
      Constructs an AxialMold1 with parameters that extend its lifespan.
      • initial growth: 0
      • growth rate: 3
      • minimum growth for propagation: 100
      • propagation rate: 0.4
      • entity type: Entities.AXIAL_MOLD1
      • age death factor: 0.0002 (low, to reduce age‑based death)
      • age death max: 0.4

  • Method Details

    • getPropagationDistributionList

      public List<CoorWeight> getPropagationDistributionList()
      Returns the shared axial propagation distribution.
      Specified by:
      getPropagationDistributionList in interface CanPropagate
      Overrides:
      getPropagationDistributionList in class AxialMold
      Returns:
      the static list of weighted axial coordinates

    • getColorHex

      public String getColorHex()
      Returns the color hex string of the entity type associated with this mold.
      Returns:
      the hexadecimal color string (e.g., "#RRGGBB")

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a single‑character string used for text‑based visualization.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      the string "X"

    • propagateTo

      public void propagateTo(Cell target)
      Propagates this mold to the given target cell by adding a new AxialMold1 instance to that cell.
      Parameters:
      target - the cell that will receive a new mold of this type
